# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements for DSA Practice
- Summary: Showcase the upgraded AI assistant in CodeGrind, highlighting Azure OpenAI integration, multi-model support, and enhanced guidance within the DSA practice platform.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-assistant-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-assistant-improvements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-05-codegrind-dsai-assistant-improvements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now features an upgraded AI assistant with Azure OpenAI integration, GPT-4o model support, and a more persistent, context-aware guidance flow to accelerate DSA learning without leaving the editor.
- CTA: Try the enhanced AI assistant in CodeGrind and share your workflow improvements with the community.
- Visual brief: A short 15-20 second video montage showing the CodeGrind editor with AI chat panel, switching between GPT-4o models, code solving hints appearing inline, and a quick problem-solving demo. Include subtle cyberpunk UI cues and a clean, readable code pane.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
